result: {"findings": "Created backend/tests/test_pipeline_integration.py with 28 integration tests covering the full monitor→signal→alert pipeline. All 856 tests pass (828 existing + 28 new). 0 regressions.", "tasks_spawned": ["db-connectivity-followup", "phase-durations-health-endpoint"]}
